name: Strawberry Trifle Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the custard: Mix cornstarch with half & half.
2. Heat milk with sugar to boiling in a heavy saucepan.
3. Remove from heat, stir in cornstarch mixture.
4. Return to heat and cook until thickened, about 2-3 minutes.
5. Add vanilla and egg yolks; whisk until almost cold.
6. Cover and chill.
7. Prepare the trifle: Cut cake into slices, spread with jam, and reassemble.
8. Cut remaining cake into cubes, arrange in bowls.
9. Sprinkle with cream sherry.
10. Wash and slice strawberries, set a few aside for garnish.
11. Divide strawberries among bowls.
12. Pour custard over strawberries and cake; drizzle with strawberry jam.
13. Cover and chill briefly.
14. Whip cream until soft peaks form, add powdered sugar and vanilla.
15. Garnish trifle with sliced strawberries and whipped cream before serving.
